logicalScenes.description: Macro soy sauce ribbon crawls across the steamy finished dumpling-lasagna top.
logicalScenes.note: Texture-first opening; final dish appears before prep and is clarified immediately by the cutaway.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dark glossy soy trails over satin translucent wrapper

notes: Ban tomato and cheese; this is dumpling lasagna.

logicalScenes.description: White sesame and green scallion fall onto the glossy top in a tight rain.
logicalScenes.note: Pay off the sexy surface, not a neutral garnish shot.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dry sesame dots against wet soy shine

logicalScenes.description: A rigid turning spatula lifts one hot square from the compact 20 cm pan, showing tender wrapper layers and juicy pork filling.
logicalScenes.note: Scale lock: one lifted portion is one quarter of an 8 in / 20 cm square pan, not a giant casserole slice.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft stacked wrappers, glossy meat layers, steam at cut edge
logicalScenes.sfxCue: soft scrape and wet turning-spatula lift

notes: Use final cutaway reference if generated.

logicalScenes.description: Fast re-anchor: the finished square pan sits on the Licorn kitchen island, steam rising, character hands nearby.
logicalScenes.note: Clarifies the object after the hook and prepares the rewind into assembly.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam halo and glossy garnish

logicalScenes.description: Raw pork drops into a bowl with finely chopped shiitake, scallion, ginger and garlic already visible.
logicalScenes.note: No ingredient lineup; start mid-action.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pink pork mound, dark mushroom flecks, green scallion

logicalScenes.description: Soy sauce and hoisin streak into the pork mixture as dark glossy ribbons.
logicalScenes.note: Make the savory sauce sexy and glossy.
logicalScenes.textureCue: black-brown soy line and thick hoisin shine

logicalScenes.description: Sambal, rice vinegar and toasted sesame oil hit the bowl in quick hard cuts.
logicalScenes.note: Red chili flecks add heat and color.
logicalScenes.textureCue: red sambal dots, clear vinegar flash, golden oil beads

logicalScenes.description: Spoon folds the filling until it becomes a sticky, cohesive, glossy paste.
logicalScenes.note: Visible hands with one simple mixing motion.
logicalScenes.textureCue: tacky pork paste clinging to spoon, shiitake and scallion suspended

notes: Do not make it cooked yet.

logicalScenes.description: Spoon lifts and drops one glossy lump back into the bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Texture payoff before assembly begins.
logicalScenes.textureCue: elastic sticky pull, wet shine

logicalScenes.description: Overhead view of the small 8 in / 20 cm square pan on the light terrazzo island.
logicalScenes.note: Scale anchor for the whole recipe; compact pan for four portions.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clean square pan, light oil glint

logicalScenes.description: Thin oil is brushed or smeared around the pan interior, leaving a light reflective film.
logicalScenes.note: Simple single hand action.
logicalScenes.textureCue: slick oil sheen on base and corners

logicalScenes.description: First thin 3-5 mm layer of sticky filling is spread across the pan base.
logicalScenes.note: This should look lush but thin, not a thick meatloaf.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet pink-brown paste flattened into glossy streaks

logicalScenes.description: A palm-size dumpling wrapper flops flat onto the filling.
logicalScenes.note: Wrapper is flat and sheet-like, not folded into a dumpling.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pale soft wrapper slumps onto glossy filling

notes: Positive scale: 8-10 cm wrapper; negative: not long lasagna noodle.

logicalScenes.description: More wrappers are placed edge-to-edge, trimmed or tucked to fill the square corners.
logicalScenes.note: About 20 wrappers total across all layers.
logicalScenes.textureCue: overlapping pale wrapper seams with minimal overlap

logicalScenes.description: Another spoonful of filling lands on the wrapper layer and spreads thin.
logicalScenes.note: Repeat action with a tighter, sexier smear.
logicalScenes.textureCue: sticky meat spread dragging glossy streaks over pale wrapper

logicalScenes.description: Second wrapper layer lands, with seams offset from the previous layer.
logicalScenes.note: Shows purposeful lasagna structure.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft wrapper sheet meets wet filling

logicalScenes.description: Quick side angle of the pan wall showing the stack rising to about 3-5 cm.
logicalScenes.note: Height lock prevents a tall Italian casserole.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thin alternating bands near the pan wall

logicalScenes.description: Final top wrapper layer is laid smooth, pale and slightly wrinkled.
logicalScenes.note: Recipe must finish with wrappers on top.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pale matte wrapper top with soft seams

logicalScenes.description: Three tablespoons of water drizzle in small clear beads over the top wrapper layer.
logicalScenes.note: Small amount only; humidification, not soup.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clear droplets collecting in wrapper wrinkles

logicalScenes.description: The square pan is lowered into a large saucepan steamer on the induction cooktop.
logicalScenes.note: Use tool-first handling; no towel-in-hand hot transfer.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pan nested above hot water, no water inside lasagna except top droplets

notes: No flames; induction remains black flush plate.

logicalScenes.description: Hot water trembles at a low boil around the outside of the square pan, halfway up the pan wall.
logicalScenes.note: Clarifies bain-marie style steaming.
logicalScenes.textureCue: tiny bubbles and wet metal reflection outside the pan

notes: No direct boiling inside the lasagna.

logicalScenes.description: Lid closes over the saucepan, trapping steam for the 25 minute cook.
logicalScenes.note: One lid action only.
logicalScenes.textureCue: condensation starts on lid edge

logicalScenes.description: Hard cut to lid lift: dense steam blooms upward from the pot.
logicalScenes.note: Main cooking payoff.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white steam burst, wet lid underside

logicalScenes.description: Top wrapper is now tender, satiny and slightly translucent with steam beads.
logicalScenes.note: Show doneness without a thermometer.
logicalScenes.textureCue: translucent wrapper sheen and tiny condensation beads

logicalScenes.description: The cooked square pan rests back on the island, steaming in the same Licorn kitchen.
logicalScenes.note: Quick reset from induction to serving surface.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam over pale glossy wrapper surface

logicalScenes.description: Dark soy sauce drizzles in thin sexy lines over the hot top.
logicalScenes.note: Repeat the hook action now in sequence.
logicalScenes.textureCue: black-brown shine bleeding into wrapper wrinkles

logicalScenes.description: Scallion ribbons scatter across one third of the surface, vivid green against soy gloss.
logicalScenes.note: Quantity lock: visible but not full coverage.
logicalScenes.textureCue: fresh green curls on wet brown shine

logicalScenes.description: White sesame rains down, catching on sauce trails and scallion.
logicalScenes.note: Dry-on-wet texture contrast.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white seeds dotting glossy dark lines

logicalScenes.description: A rigid turning spatula presses into one quarter of the compact square lasagne, defining a clean serving edge.
logicalScenes.note: Clean portion setup; no knife sawing spectacle.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft wrapper compresses and rebounds around turning spatula edge

logicalScenes.description: The portion slides up on the rigid turning spatula, steam revealing alternating dumpling wrapper and pork layers.
logicalScenes.note: Primary food-porn payoff; not a cheese pull.
logicalScenes.textureCue: juicy cross-section, tender pale sheets, glossy meat filling

logicalScenes.description: A small soy-sesame puddle glistens under the lifted portion.
logicalScenes.note: Sauce is present but does not flood the pan.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thin sauce pool reflecting steam and sesame

logicalScenes.description: The lifted edge jiggles softly, showing tender dumpling-wrapper elasticity.
logicalScenes.note: A tiny movement beat, no slow motion.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft satin wrapper wobble and juicy filling shine

logicalScenes.description: The finished pan and lifted portion are framed with the Licorn character visible, satisfied and ready to taste.
logicalScenes.note: Character supports the food; food remains the hero.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam, gloss and green-white garnish color contrast

logicalScenes.description: Spoon edge breaks the hot portion, exposing a juicy bite-size layered interior.
logicalScenes.note: Bite reveal without mouth close-up complexity.
logicalScenes.textureCue: tender wrapper tear, glossy pork filling, steam

logicalScenes.description: Final close-up of the square pan surface: soy shine, sesame, scallion and steam pulsing upward.
logicalScenes.note: Last texture payoff before end card-free finish.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wet soy gloss, dry sesame speckles, fresh scallion curls

logicalScenes.description: End on the Licorn character visibly satisfied beside the steaming finished dumpling lasagna in the same kitchen.
logicalScenes.note: No speech, no text; satisfied finish in kitchen context.
logicalScenes.textureCue: finished glossy pan remains visible in foreground
logicalScenes.sfxCue: small happy breath-like kitchen ambience without speech
